title: Delicate Crisp Ukrainian Squid Stew
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring squid, cooked in a clay pot to achieve a delicate crisp texture, with a bitter flavor profile, this stew is perfect for festive occasions and is FODMAP friendly.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite sized pieces

instructions: Preheat the clay pot in the oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
Heat the garlic-infused oil in the preheated clay pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery to the clay pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the squid to the clay pot and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the dried dill weed, salt, and black pepper to the clay pot and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the stew for 20 minutes.
Remove the clay pot from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh dill weed if desired.
